title: Staffs & Tomes
description: A Data Pack which adds magical weapons!
body:
![Rendered Title of Staffs & Tomes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/917190e89a9167d41ddc5f6d99d46a3a320255cc.png)

# Requirements
- [aolu Common Resources](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aolu-common-resources)
- If using Data Pack version: Copy and Paste the Data Pack into your Resource Packs folder and activate it\
**OR**\
Download [aolu Resourcepack Collection](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/aolu-resourcepack-collection)

# Description
Staffs & Tomes is a Data Pack which adds various Magic Weapons to the game, all of which are crafted!

![Amethyst Staff Spell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gw8E35mk/images/a00b516de1e66bf4f0ff97922995879b98408803.webp)
![Blaze Staff Spell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gw8E35mk/images/1bd152217fbf19b27c960083dca85d69db735aaf.webp)
![Shadow Tome Spell](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gw8E35mk/images/69aaac05cab0d13d27250ba1fe12ee34354d0059.webp)

# Features & Information
**Magical Weapons cannot do Melee Attacks!**\
\
**Each Magical Weapon has 3 Spells**:
- **Basic Spell** via **Right Click**
- **Crouch Spell** via **Crouch Right Click**
- **Sprint Spell** via **Sprint Right Click**


**Magical Weapons will scale off of your current attributes**.\
As such, Status effects such as **Strength**, **Weakness**, **Haste** and **Mining Fatigue** will also affect your Spells & Casts

- **Attack Damage**: Spell Power and Effectiveness
- **Attack Speed**: Spell Cast Speed & Cooldown

Using Magic Weapons in the **offhand** will reduce your Attack Damage and Attack Speed\
Using Magic Weapons in the **mainhand** with an **empty offhand** will grant 0.3 Attack Speed and will additionally grant 8 Armor Points while casting

**New Enchantments**:
- **Swift Strike**: +0.1 Attack Speed. Max Level is 3
- **Brute Force**: +1 Attack Damage. Cannot be added alongside another Damage Enchant. Max Level is 3


# Weapons
### Amethyst Staff
![Amethyst Staff Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gw8E35mk/images/cb92c1e853e127c587bedae9d0e345a10063f22f.png)\
**Basic Spell**: Launch an Amethyst Shard at high velocity, shattering on impact with a block and leaving sharp buds on the ground\
**Crouch Spell**: Place an Amplifier in front of you, Granting 25% Attack Damage and Attack Speed to all Players inside\
**Sprint Spell**: Raise a line of Sharp Amethyst Buds along the ground in front of you, dealing Magic Damage and Slowing targets hit



### Blaze Staff
![Blaze Staff Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gw8E35mk/images/ab7c46b07b3c2fcec829eddd82ceb002e5bb7122.png)\
**Basic Spell**: Shoot a Fireball which explodes upon hitting an enemy, damaging and burning all in its radius\
**Crouch Spell**: Up to 5 random enemies nearby will have a pillar of fire appear beneath them, constantly damaging and burning them\
**Sprint Spell**: Put a shield of fire around yourself, granting you fire resistance whilst Burning and Slowing enemies close by.\
If you are on fire whilst the shield is acitve, you Gain 20% Attack Damage and Attack Speed, Resistance I and 4x Spell Cooldown Speed


### Shadow Tome
![Shadow Tome Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gw8E35mk/images/c7ba180ccdadeba577f243605c48c3a78843b3d4.png)\
**This Tome increases Attack Damage when in the dark, but Decreases Attack Damage when in the light**\
**Basic Spell**: Launch a small Mass of Darkness ahead, **Weakening** and briefly **Withering** the target it hits. This can be held to cast continuously, increasing your Attack Speed after each shot. After 10 shots, releasing will shoot out 5 darkness masses at once\
**Crouch Spell**: Launch a Seed of Darkness. Once it lands, it creates a nest which will produce Shadowspawn every 2 seconds which will fight for you. Enemies can and will target the nest and destroy it\
**Sprint Spell**: Release a **Warden Sonic Boom** in front of you, Leaving enemies **Slowed** and **Nauseated** for a short period


### Lucent Tome
![Lucent Tome Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gw8E35mk/images/25faa077fa384c5061cd8adc45d5255213193aa3.png)\
**All Lucent spells that affect players will also affect their pets**\
**Basic Spell**: Randomly release Spirits of Light between you and other nearby players. the spirits will float around and fly into a player, healing them\
**Crouch Spell**: Place a Circle of Light at your feet, **Healing Players** and **Harming Undead**\
**Sprint Spell**: Grant a temporary buff which cleanses negative status sffects and converts them into their positive counterpart
